scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/db generate && bun run --cwd apps/panel_books build
scripts.build:panel: bun run --cwd packages/db generate && bun run --cwd apps/panel_books build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/pdf-pipeline typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/panel_books typecheck
